title: Takeda — White Space
html:
Takeda White-Space BD Map

Last updated: 2026-05-05 Purpose: Identify, prioritize, and plan pursuit of untapped revenue across Takeda brands x ZoomRx services

How to Read This Matrix

Legend:

  • Active (contracted or in-flight)
  • HIGH — High priority white space (pursue in FY26-27)
  • MED — Medium priority (pursue FY27-28, or opportunistic)
  • LOW — Low priority (long-term / speculative)
  • N/A — Not applicable or poor fit

Active cells reflect confirmed projects from SharePoint. HIGH priority cells reflect opportunities with clear strategic rationale and existing relationship context. The matrices below are organized by TA to match Takeda's business unit structure.

GI: Entyvio, Eohilia, Gattex

Service Entyvio (IBD) Eohilia (EoE) Gattex (SBS)
PET HIGH Active (Rare GI PET 2025-26) Historical (2020-2025)
ATU HIGH MED Historical (ATU/PCA)
HCP-Patient HIGH MED Historical (Motegrity HCP-Pt)
Message Testing HIGH MED LOW
MSL / MEE HIGH MED LOW
Digital Tracking MED MED LOW
OCE MED LOW N/A
FRM LOW LOW N/A
KAM LOW LOW N/A
Launch KPI N/A LOW N/A
Prelaunch Active (VERDICT 2026) N/A N/A
Conference Study MED (DDW, ACG) LOW N/A
Social Listening MED LOW N/A
Patient Scribe MED LOW N/A
Qual MED LOW LOW
Commercial Analytics MED LOW N/A
Sales Simulation LOW LOW N/A

GI Summary:

  • Active cells: 2 (Eohilia PET, Entyvio VERDICT prelaunch)
  • HIGH priority cells: 5 (all on Entyvio) — the biosimilar cliff makes Entyvio the most urgent BD target in GI
  • Key insight: Entyvio is Takeda's largest brand with zero recurring ZoomRx tracking. The VERDICT prelaunch study is the entry point. If the biosimilar enters market in 2026, competitive PET, patient switching studies, and message testing for differentiation are immediate needs. A full Entyvio tracking suite (PET + ATU + HCP-Pt + Message Testing + MSL) could be worth $300-500K annually.

Rare Disease: Takhzyro, Adzynma, Livtencity

Service Takhzyro (HAE) Adzynma (TTP) Livtencity (CMV)
PET HIGH MED LOW
ATU HIGH MED LOW
HCP-Patient MED LOW LOW
Message Testing MED LOW LOW
MSL / MEE HIGH MED MED
Medical Data Assessment Active (HAE MDA 2025) LOW LOW
Digital Tracking MED LOW LOW
OCE LOW LOW LOW
Launch KPI N/A MED (launched 2023) N/A
Conference Study MED (NORD, WORLDSymposium) LOW LOW
Patient Scribe MED LOW LOW
Qual MED LOW LOW
Sales Simulation LOW LOW LOW

Rare Disease Summary:

  • Active cells: 1 (Takhzyro HAE Medical Data Assessment)
  • HIGH priority cells: 3 (Takhzyro PET, ATU, MSL)
  • Key insight: The HAE MDA (switching topline) proves ZoomRx can serve the Rare Disease BU. Takhzyro is the market leader in HAE prophylaxis — a PET tracker would provide competitive intelligence against Orladeyo (oral), Cinryze, and Haegarda. MSL tracking is particularly valuable in rare disease where medical affairs drives adoption.

Neuroscience: Narcolepsy Pipeline, Soticlestat, Vyvanse

Service Narcolepsy Pipeline Soticlestat (Epilepsy) Vyvanse (ADHD)
PET HIGH (post-launch) MED (if approved) LOW (generic competition)
ATU MED (post-launch) MED (if approved) LOW
HCP-Patient MED LOW LOW
Message Testing MED (post-launch) LOW LOW
MSL / MEE MED LOW LOW
Conference Study Active (4 conferences) MED LOW
Launch KPI HIGH (post-launch) MED (if approved) N/A
Digital Tracking LOW LOW LOW
Qual MED LOW LOW
Social Listening MED LOW LOW

Neuroscience Summary:

  • Active cells: 1 (Conference Studies — 4 conferences covered)
  • HIGH priority cells: 2 (Narcolepsy launch PET and Launch KPI — post-approval)
  • Key insight: Conference studies are the established ZoomRx methodology in neuroscience. The narcolepsy pipeline's commercial timeline is unclear, but when any narcolepsy asset launches, ZoomRx is the natural launch tracking partner given 12+ months of conference study context. Soticlestat reactivates the historical Epilepsy PET engagement if approved.

Immunology / Dermatology: Zasocitinib

Service Zasocitinib (PsO) Zasocitinib (PsA) Zasocitinib (IBD)
PET HIGH HIGH HIGH
ATU HIGH HIGH HIGH
HCP-Patient HIGH MED MED
Message Testing HIGH HIGH MED
MSL / MEE HIGH HIGH HIGH
Launch KPI HIGH HIGH HIGH
Color Preference RT Active (Feb 2026) N/A N/A
Radiographic RT Active (Sep 2025) N/A N/A
Global Pulse Active (Nov 2025) (included) (included)
Medical Data Feedback Active (Oct 2025) N/A N/A
Digital Tracking MED MED LOW
OCE MED MED LOW
FRM MED LOW LOW
KAM LOW LOW LOW
Conference Study MED (AAD, EADV) MED (ACR) MED (DDW)
Qual MED MED LOW
Social Listening MED LOW LOW
Sales Simulation MED LOW LOW

Immunology/Dermatology Summary:

  • Active cells: 4 (Color Pref RT, Radiographic RT, Global Pulse, Medical Data Feedback)
  • HIGH priority cells: 15 (across 3 indications) — zasocitinib is the single largest white-space opportunity on the account
  • Key insight: Zasocitinib in Phase 3 across 3 indications represents a potential $500K-1M+ annual engagement if ZoomRx captures the full launch suite across all indications. ZoomRx already has 4 active pre-launch projects. The PsO indication will likely launch first (2027-2028 [UNVERIFIED]), followed by PsA and IBD. Each indication is essentially a separate launch with its own tracking needs, specialty audience (dermatologists, rheumatologists, gastroenterologists), and competitive dynamics.

Hematology: Mezagitamab

Service Mezagitamab (IgAN)
PET HIGH (post-launch)
ATU HIGH (post-launch)
HCP-Patient MED
Message Testing HIGH (pre-launch)
MSL / MEE HIGH
Launch KPI HIGH (post-launch)
Color Preference RT Active (Apr 2026)
Digital Tracking MED
Conference Study MED (ASN, Kidney Week)
Qual MED
Social Listening LOW

Hematology Summary:

  • Active cells: 1 (Color Preference RT)
  • HIGH priority cells: 5 (PET, ATU, Message Testing, MSL, Launch KPI)
  • Key insight: Mezagitamab in IgA Nephropathy enters a market with recently launched competitors (Filspari, Nefecon). Pre-launch message testing is particularly valuable — Takeda needs to differentiate against 2+ established competitors. If approved, a full launch suite in nephrology (PET + ATU + Launch KPI + MSL) is a new TA for ZoomRx.

Top 10 Opportunities (Ranked)

Ranked by composite score of: revenue potential, ease of entry (existing relationship + pre-launch context), strategic value (unlocks further work), and timing urgency.

Rank Brand Service Est. Revenue Entry Strategy Timeline Rationale
1 Zasocitinib (PsO) PET + ATU $200-300K Pitch now, pre-launch. ZoomRx has 4 pre-launch projects as proof of commitment. Frame as: "You trusted us with branding and market shaping. Now let us track the launch." Pre-launch proposal FY26; execute post-launch (2027-2028) Largest single-brand revenue opportunity. Pre-launch context = highest switching cost vs. competitors.
2 Entyvio Competitive PET $100-150K/wave Use VERDICT prelaunch delivery as the pitch moment. Frame as: "Biosimilar entry means you need competitive tracking. We already understand your franchise from VERDICT." FY26 Q3-Q4 (post-VERDICT delivery) Takeda's largest brand with zero recurring tracking. Biosimilar urgency makes this time-sensitive.
3 Zasocitinib (PsO) Message Testing $80-120K Natural follow-on from Color Preference RT and Medical Data Feedback. Frame as: "You have the branding and the data story. Now optimize your HCP messages before launch." FY26 Q3-Q4 Pre-launch message testing is the highest-value pre-commercial research after market landscape and branding.
4 Zasocitinib (PsO) MSL / MEE $60-100K Pitch to medical affairs contacts (from Radiographic RT and Medical Data Feedback Study). Frame as: "Your medical affairs team shaped the data story. Now track whether MSLs are delivering it effectively." Pre-launch or launch window Opens medical affairs budget line; applies across all zasocitinib indications.
5 Entyvio Message Testing $80-120K Biosimilar defense messaging is critical. Frame as: "How do you differentiate Entyvio from biosimilar alternatives in the HCP conversation?" FY26 (urgent — pre-biosimilar entry) Defensive messaging is time-sensitive; must happen before or at biosimilar launch.
6 Takhzyro PET $80-120K Use HAE Medical Data Assessment as proof point. Frame as: "We tracked switching patterns. Now let us track promotional effectiveness to ensure Takhzyro maintains leadership." FY26-27 Takhzyro is the HAE market leader; competitive tracking protects the franchise.
7 Conference Study Retainer Cross-TA $150-250K/year Propose a retainer covering 4-6 conferences/year: 2 neuro (SLEEP, AAN), 1-2 GI (DDW, ACG), 1 derm (AAD), 1 rare disease (NORD). Frame as: "You already use us for 4 conferences. Let's systematize it." FY26 Q3 (for FY27 annual planning) Converts project-based conference work into predictable annual revenue.
8 Mezagitamab (IgAN) Message Testing $60-100K Follow Color Preference RT with message testing. Frame as: "Brand identity is set. Now test your HCP messages against Filspari and Nefecon positioning." Pre-launch (FY26-27) Pre-launch message optimization in competitive IgAN market.
9 Entyvio MSL / MEE $60-100K Frame as: "Biosimilar defense is not just a commercial challenge — it's a medical affairs challenge. Track whether MSLs are effectively communicating Entyvio's differentiation." FY26-27 MSL tracking across all Takeda TAs is a greenfield — Entyvio is the anchor brand.
10 Zasocitinib (PsA) PET + ATU $150-250K Second-indication launch tracking. Frame as: "We tracked PsO launch. Now replicate for PsA with rheumatologists." Post-PsA launch (2028+) Replicates the PsO tracking package for a second audience.

Revenue Summary of Top 10

Metric Low Estimate High Estimate
Total Top 10 (cumulative, multi-year) $1.0M $1.7M
Realistic close rate (40-50%) $400K $850K
Annual run-rate if anchors convert $500K $900K

Priority Matrix Summary

Priority Count Concentration
Active 9 cells Scattered across 6 TAs; niche methodologies dominate
HIGH priority ~30 cells Concentrated on zasocitinib (15 cells across 3 indications), Entyvio (5 cells), Mezagitamab (5 cells), Takhzyro (3 cells)
MED priority ~40 cells Broad mid-term opportunities across all TAs
LOW priority ~30 cells Legacy brands (Gattex, Vyvanse) and speculative adjacencies

Competitive Displacement Strategy

Current State

The vendor landscape at Takeda is largely unknown — no incumbent vendor names are documented from the SharePoint scan. This is both a risk (unknown competition) and an opportunity (no confirmed entrenched competitors on flagship brands).

Approach: Establish Before Competitors Arrive

Unlike accounts where ZoomRx must displace an incumbent PET or ATU vendor, Takeda's flagship brands (Entyvio, Takhzyro, zasocitinib) have no confirmed ZoomRx tracking services AND no confirmed competitor tracking services. The strategy is to be first — not to displace.

  1. Zasocitinib: Lock in the launch tracking proposal before launch. Once Takeda's immunology/dermatology team begins the launch vendor selection process, pre-launch engagement history (4 projects) gives ZoomRx a structural advantage. No competitor has this context.

  2. Entyvio: The VERDICT prelaunch study is the entry point. Convert it to competitive tracking before Takeda's GI team solicits proposals from other vendors for biosimilar monitoring.

  3. Takhzyro: The HAE Medical Data Assessment is the proof point. Propose PET before another vendor gets the Rare Disease tracking mandate.

Key Risk: Conference Study Competition

Conference studies are a growing service category. Other MR firms (particularly congress intelligence specialists) may compete for Takeda's conference research budget. ZoomRx's defense: integrated service offering (conference studies + tracking + launch support from one vendor) and 12+ months of established conference study delivery.

Summary

Takeda is a uniquely positioned ZoomRx account: deep pipeline engagement, unmatched methodological diversity, and massive white space on flagship brands. The BD imperative is clear — convert pre-launch breadth into post-launch tracking depth. Three bets define the next 24 months:

  1. Zasocitinib full launch suite (PsO first, then PsA, then IBD) — the largest single-brand opportunity across the ZoomRx portfolio
  2. Entyvio biosimilar defense tracking — time-sensitive, high-value, strategically important to Takeda's corporate financials
  3. Conference study retainer + MSL program — recurring revenue anchors that transform a project-based account into a tracker-based account

If all three convert, Takeda becomes a $1.5M+ account. If none convert, the account remains a collection of one-off projects in the $500-800K range. The account team's job over the next 6 months is to make at least one of these three bets pay off.

This map should be refreshed quarterly or whenever a new brand/pipeline development changes the priority landscape. Next refresh: August 2026.

Back to Accounts Hub | Home
